name: ArriVent BioPharma, Inc.
business: ArriVent BioPharma is a clinical-stage biopharmaceutical company dedicated to the identification, development and commercialization of differentiated medicines to address the unmet medical needs of patients with cancers. Its lead product candidate is firmonertinib, an investigational EGFR mutant-selective TKI for the treatment of NSCLC patients with EGFR mutations. The company also has ARR-217, a next-generation antibody drug conjugate, in Phase 1 clinical development.

exposures.sentence: We are a clinical-stage biopharmaceutical company dedicated to the identification, development and commercialization of differentiated medicines to address the unmet medical needs of patients with cancers.
